_source: Matter Core Specification §4.3.2.2 (Compressed Fabric Identifier) worked example.
_status: NEEDS_REVIEW: the root_public_key_hex below is 67 bytes (134 hex chars) which is INVALID for a P-256 uncompressed public key (must be 65 bytes / 130 hex chars). No 65-byte subset of this key produces the claimed expected_compressed_fabric_id_hex via HKDF-SHA256(salt=fabric_id_BE, ikm=pub[1..], info='CompressedFabric'). Resolve against the current spec revision and matter.js before M6.6.5 real-device CASE sessions.
_note: The in-tree smoke test uses the first 65 bytes of root_public_key_hex and pins the actual HKDF output (324bf4e044797f0e) until this vector is corrected.
